rationale.R1.5: The agent provides a detailed critique of the paragraph's structure and content without suggesting any reorganization.
rationale.RX.1: The agent identifies several substantive issues but does not flag uncertainty in the claims made.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers all aspects of the paragraph, ensuring that no part is overlooked or misinterpreted.
rationale.RX.4: The critique does not introduce any new errors, fabrications, or harmful content and avoids regression from the original text.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides a detailed analysis but does not trace every non-cosmetic change in the output.
